payload.description: Biannual online survey conducted last two weeks of May for LIRR and Metro-North customer satisfaction
Full GCM service introduced; customer satisfaction at GCM at 96% in survey

Mother Nature unleashed a summer torrent with Biblical short-term rain totals and subsequent flooding throughout the Hudson Valley leading to washouts, fallen trees, and high-water conditions along the Metro-North ROW; service suspensions on Hudson Line north of Croton-Harmon and upper Harlem Line

LIRR new schedules begin with major improvements including more direct service to Brooklyn during AM peak, more express service on Huntington and Ronkonkoma branches, and reassigned stops to more Atlantic Terminal trains
Contractor work on GCM tunnels; Hempstead branch trains will originate and terminate at Atlantic Terminal; West Hempstead trains at Jamaica; Huntington and Port Washington trains at Penn Station
Contractor work on GCM tunnels; Hempstead branch trains will originate and terminate at Atlantic Terminal; West Hempstead trains at Jamaica; Huntington and Port Washington trains at Penn Station

tool_args.label: Van Wyck Bridge Waterproofing Work - August 26-27, 2023

payload.description: Waterproofing work on Van Wyck Bridge in Jamaica; schedule adjustments to West Hempstead and Babylon trains

tool_args.label: Switch Installation & Concrete Tie Work - September 16-17, 2023

payload.description: Switch installation work east of Floral Park on the main line and concrete tie work between Bethpage and Hicksville; schedules on Oyster Bay, Huntington, and Ronkonkoma lines adjusted

payload.claim_text: East New York station saw the lowest score of 41%, which is about the same as it was a year ago, clearly a work in progress

payload.claim_text: Metro-North 89% overall satisfaction, with 91% on the Hudson Line in particular

tool_args.label: Lowest Crime Rate Since 2019 on LIRR and Metro-North

payload.claim_text: The first half of 2023 saw the lowest crime rate since 2019 at the start of the pandemic

tool_args.label: Lightning Strike at CP Camerons - Port Jervis Line

payload.claim_text: NJT reported a lightning strike at CP Camerons which resulted in a fire that destroyed the CIL; code lines were down between Ridgewood Junction and Suffern; accounted for nearly 50% of all delayed trains for the month
Seating availability was the third most important attribute with a decrease of 11%. This correlates directly to the ridership increase
payload.subject: Metro-North Railroad

tool_args.label: Financial Reports Not Completed for July 2023 Meeting

payload.description: President Rinaldi stated that financial reports typically included with the Committee materials were not completed in time for this meeting because of the accelerated schedule; all financial reports will be distributed through the Director's Desk and posted on MTA's website before the end of the month
